purpose: Tool-neutral image prompt for the project-level Xue Linqiang multi-state character reference board.

shared_rules.format: single vertical PNG production character reference board, no visible labels or captions inside the image
shared_rules.style: low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic costume and material rendering, restrained cinematic lighting, readable for mobile vertical production reference
shared_rules.locked_badge_rule: Do not redesign existing faction emblems. Grey Wall Army has no official badge. Do not invent a Grey Wall logo, chest badge, shoulder patch, crest, or banner. Use the locked Zhaoming emblem only as root reference for an almost-erased inherited armor pressure mark hidden on the inside or edge of an old armor plate; it must be broken by rust, snow scratches, dents, and age, never clean, complete, or openly displayed.
must_have: Xue Linqiang must read as a weather-bent old wall master around 50
broad but bent shoulders, stable heavy lower stance, wind-cracked face, old scar, frost-cracked rough hands
three states must preserve one continuous identity
grey-stone padded jacket, inherited mismatched old armor plates, coarse hemp wall scarf, snowline leg wraps, old iron buckles, bone whistle, and worn long spear
low magic must remain physical and restrained, with no aura or spell display
no readable text, no labels, no UI, no watermark
shared_rules.negative_prompt: palace general, imperial commander, royal guard, shiny heroic armor, clean knight plate, ceremonial armor, young handsome warrior, white-haired immortal master, generic fantasy barbarian, ragged beggar militia, filthy refugee, full clean Zhaoming badge, large sun-moon emblem, visible chest badge, shoulder patch, new Grey Wall logo, banner crest, complete emblem, redesigned faction mark, Suming insect-war office uniform, Qingming white official robe, modern military uniform, modern tactical gear, glowing martial aura, spell circle, high fantasy magic, readable text, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, oversaturated game art, cyberpunk, sci-fi

input_images.role: existing vertical project character board layout reference
existing vertical project character board layout and material-detail reference
Grey Wall object-symbol reference; do not turn into a formal badge
locked Zhaoming emblem reference for almost-erased armor pressure mark only; do not redesign or display as clean badge

prompts.image_prompt: Create one vertical PNG production character reference board for Xue Linqiang from the series Severed Homeland. Use the existing project character boards as layout logic: top row three full-body states of the same person, lower rows with close-up detail panels and material swatches, no visible labels or captions. Xue Linqiang is a weather-bent old Grey Wall master around 50, a human border military-household veteran with martial vein at the Huajin threshold. He has broad shoulders and a strong wall-soldier frame, but years of wind, snow, hunger pressure, and wall labor bend his upper back slightly. His lower stance is heavy and stable, built to absorb gate impact, not to look heroic. Face: wind-cracked skin, old scar, rough cheek texture, frost-reddened brow and nose, guarded eyes, short hard beard shadow or stubble. Hands: frost-cracked rough fingers with swollen joints, thick from holding spear, wall stone, and old iron buckles. Show the same Xue Linqiang in three continuous states: 1) daily wall-guard state, grey-stone padded jacket, inherited mismatched dulled old armor plates, coarse hemp wall scarf, old iron buckles, rawhide cord, short worn bone whistle fixed to chest cord or belt, worn long spear, complete practical clothing, no official uniform; 2) night heavy-guard state, heavier blackstone-colored shoulder armor, thicker inherited plate layers, old iron rim bands, snow-crusted cloth edge, reinforced snowline leg wraps, braced Huajin-ready stance for absorbing a gate collision, bone whistle and spear still present, no polished commander armor; 3) concealed assistance state, deep grey outer cloak or overwrap suppressing armor shine, scarf pulled higher, quiet rope ties, darkened spear shaft, hidden bone whistle, same face and hands still identifiable, old soldier identity not turned into assassin costume. Include lower detail panels: wind-cracked old scar face; frost-cracked hands gripping spear or buckle; short tactical bone whistle with hemp cord and coarse wall scarf knot; worn long spear with old iron spearhead and weathered wood shaft; inherited old armor plate turned or lifted to show an almost-erased Sun-Moon pressure mark on the inside or edge, broken by rust, snow scratches, dents, and age; snowline leg wraps with old iron buckles; blackstone wall crack with his compact impact-absorbing stance; material swatches of grey wall cloth, blackstone, snow crust, old iron, bone white, rawhide, dark blood repair cord, and extremely dull old-gold pressure trace. Badge rule: Grey Wall Army has no official badge, so do not invent any Grey Wall crest, shoulder patch, chest plaque, flag, or rank badge. The locked Zhaoming emblem may appear only as a barely readable pressure trace on inherited armor in a close-up detail panel or hidden plate edge, not as a clean, complete, frontal, bright, public emblem. Low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic cloth, leather, old iron, bone, blackstone, snow, restrained cinematic lighting, production reference clarity. No visible labels, no captions, no readable text, no UI, no watermark.
prompts.negative_prompt: palace general, imperial commander, royal guard, shiny heroic armor, clean symmetric knight plate, ceremonial parade armor, young handsome warrior, white-haired immortal master, glowing martial master, generic fantasy barbarian, black assassin costume, ragged beggar militia, filthy refugee, complete Zhaoming emblem, clean sun-moon badge, large chest emblem, shoulder patch, new Grey Wall logo, banner crest, rank plaque, redesigned faction mark, Suming insect-war office uniform, Qingming white official robe, modern military uniform, modern tactical gear, spell circle, glowing aura, divine light, full-body magic lines, readable text, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, oversaturated game art, cyberpunk, sci-fi
